case_title: VERNON FRISON VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED OCT-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2019 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (525)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2019

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY $720.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $720.00, REVIEW OF PLAINTIFF'S BILLS SHOWS THAT HIS CABLE PACK IS $20 PER MONTH MORE EXPENSIVE TODAY WITH XFINITY THAN IT WAS IN 2015 WITH DISH. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PREVENTS PLAINTIFF FROM RECOVERY PRIOR TO 10/10/2016. THE COURT AWARDS 36 MONTHS OF BREACH DAMAGES AT $20 PER MONTH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: CORRECT MAILING ADDRESS. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GAVIN, MERCEDES A SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR JOHN STEWART COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR MAY-08-2019 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2019 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON MAY-08-2019 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 306, JUDGE RICHARD ULMER. (206)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRISON, VERNON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY $720.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $720.00, COURT SETS ASIDE JUDGMENT BECAUSE OF DEFECTIVE SERVICE. AFTER REHEARING COURT ENTERS SAME JUDGMENT. REVIEW OF PLAINTIFF'S BILLS SHOW THAT HIS CABLE PACK IS $20 PER MONTH MORE EXPENSIVE TODAY WITH XFINITY THAN IT WAS IN 2015 WITH DISH. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PREVENTS PLAINTIFF FROM RECOVERY PRIOR TO OCT-10-2016. THE COURT AWARDS $20 PER MONTH FOR 36 MONTHS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIM APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2019 DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT. RESPONDENT VERNON FRISON IS PRESENT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
ORDER DISMISSING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II PLAINTIFF VERNON FRISON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY WAS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THERESA LIU REGINAL DIRECTOR AND JACKIE MITCHELL PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY MAILED TO RESPONDENT FRISON, VERNON
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,084.00 FILED BY FRISON, VERNON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF VERNON FRISON. DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAR-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY, THE JOHN STEWARD COMPANY REPRESENTED BY ADAM LAVINE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE:A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
